Polykleitos

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Doryphoros
by Polykleitos
Classical Greek · Polykleitos · c. 440 BCE
The "Spear Bearer" — a treatise on ideal human proportion made in marble. Polykleitos wrote a book called the Canon about it; only this statue survives.
←Paionios Praxiteles→
